title: Spectrum LPW2200 Electric Pressure Washer — 2200W, 170 Bar, Cleaning Kit Included
description_html:
Strip dirt, grime and green build-up from driveways, patios, fencing and vehicles with the Spectrum LPW2200 — a 2200W mains-electric pressure washer that delivers up to 170 bar of working pressure and a 450 L/hr flow rate, putting it firmly in semi-professional territory while still plugging into a standard 13A socket.

Built to last, not to disposable

Where most pressure washers in this price band rely on plastic pump components that fail under sustained use, the LPW2200 is built around a brass pump head and ceramic-coated pistons. That's the same construction philosophy you'll find in machines costing twice as much, and it's the single biggest reason this unit is backed by Spectrum's 5-year warranty (T&C's apply).

Quick to deploy, tidy to store

Integrated wheels and a transport handle let you move the machine around without lifting. A rotating cord holder means no more wrestling with tangled cable, and on-board storage keeps the lance, hose and accessories tidy between jobs. The 5m mains cable and 5m steel-braided high-pressure hose give you a useful working radius without needing extension leads.

Cleaning kit included as standard

Most washers ship with a single lance and leave you to buy the rest. The LPW2200 comes complete with a flat brush, fixed brush and rotary brush, plus a built-in detergent tank so you can add the right cleaning solution for the surface you're working on — ideal for car bodywork, decking restoration or stubborn patio stains.

Variable pressure for every task

A pressure and flow-rate control lets you dial the machine down for paintwork or up for sealed concrete, so a single tool covers everything from a careful car wash to blasting moss out of block paving. Maximum water inlet temperature is 50°C.

Why buy from MowDirect

  • 5-year Spectrum warranty (T&C's apply) — supported directly by us, not by a generic distributor
  • UK stock, UK dispatch, UK after-sales
  • Spare parts and service support available throughout the warranty period

metafields.custom.feature_bullets:
• 2200W mains-electric motor delivering up to 170 bar working pressure and 450 L/hr flow rate
  • Brass pump head and ceramic-coated pistons — built for sustained use, not occasional weekend work
  • Complete cleaning kit included: flat brush, fixed brush, rotary brush and built-in detergent tank
  • Variable pressure and flow control — adapts from gentle car washing to heavy patio blasting
  • Integrated wheels, transport handle and rotating cord holder for tangle-free storage
  • 5m mains cable and 5m steel-braided high-pressure hose for a useful working radius
  • Backed by Spectrum's 5-year warranty (T&C's apply)
metafields.custom.bullet_two: Brass pump head and ceramic-coated pistons give this 2200W washer the durability of machines costing twice as much.
metafields.custom.bullet_three: Complete cleaning kit included as standard — flat, fixed and rotary brushes plus a detergent tank, so you're ready to clean the moment it arrives.

title: Spectrum LPW1600 Electric Pressure Washer — 1600W, 130 Bar
description_html:
The Spectrum LPW1600 is a compact, mains-electric pressure washer designed for the jobs most homes need to tackle two or three times a year — patios after winter, garden furniture in spring, the car at the weekend, the bins when they need it. 1600W of motor power, up to 130 bar of working pressure and a 420 L/hr flow rate give you proper cleaning performance without committing to a semi-professional machine.

Built around quality components

Unlike most washers in this price bracket, the LPW1600 uses a brass pump head and ceramic-coated pistons — engineering normally reserved for far pricier units. That's why we can stand behind it with a 5-year warranty (T&C's apply) where the supermarket alternatives offer one or two.

Easy to move, easy to put away

Integrated wheels and a transport handle make it simple to wheel from shed to driveway. A rotating cord holder takes the frustration out of packing the cable away, and on-board storage keeps the lance, hose and connections tidy between jobs. At just 5.8kg the LPW1600 is genuinely portable — no two-person lifts, no hauling it up garage steps.

Variable pressure across every job

A pressure and flow-rate control lets you ease back for paintwork and rinsing, then crank up for moss-stripping and patio prep. The 5m steel-braided high-pressure hose and 5m mains cable give you a 10m working radius without extension leads. Maximum water inlet temperature is 50°C.

Why buy from MowDirect

  • 5-year Spectrum warranty (T&C's apply) — supported directly by us, not by a generic distributor
  • UK stock, UK dispatch, UK after-sales
  • Spare parts and service support available throughout the warranty period

metafields.custom.feature_bullets:
• 1600W mains-electric motor with up to 130 bar working pressure and 420 L/hr flow rate
  • Brass pump head and ceramic-coated pistons — built for proper longevity, not occasional use only
  • Compact 5.8kg body with integrated wheels and transport handle for easy garden-to-shed moves
  • Variable pressure and flow control adapts from car washing to patio blasting
  • Rotating cord holder and on-board accessory storage for tangle-free packing away
  • 5m mains cable and 5m steel-braided high-pressure hose for a 10m working radius
  • Backed by Spectrum's 5-year warranty (T&C's apply)
metafields.custom.bullet_two: Brass pump head and ceramic-coated pistons give this 1600W washer the kind of longevity normally reserved for machines costing twice as much.
metafields.custom.bullet_three: Compact 5.8kg body with integrated wheels and a transport handle — genuinely portable, no two-person lifts.
